sourceRef.citation: PROF DR. MASTOOR FATIMA BUKHARI MANIK MUSTAFA SHAR et al. 2026

statement.en: ARCHAEOMETERIC ANALYSIS OF STANDARDIZED WEIGHTS FOUND AT BUTH JO DARO SITE IN LOWER SINDH

proposer: PROF DR. MASTOOR FATIMA BUKHARI MANIK MUSTAFA SHAR

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This appears to be a preprint or provisional academic work (dated 2026, future date suggesting typographical error or speculative publication). The title indicates an archaeometric study of standardized weights from Mohenjo-daro (variant spelling: Buth Jo Daro), which is empirically investigable but the abstract is absent, preventing evaluation of methodological rigor, data quality, or conclusion validity. The categorical assignment to cs.AI is incongruent with archaeology/archaeometry, suggesting possible metadata error. Without methodology and findings visibility, truth-status remains under provisional validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 遺された重さたちが倍々で整然と増えゆく、古き者らの秩序の記憶。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 大いなる均衡の塔：積み重ねられた証拠が、消えた文明の測りの心を語る。
